reviews.comment:
Quise que me atiendan en el negocio de repuestos y accesorios, espere más de 30 minutos que venga alguien reclamando 2 veces al playero y a lo ultimo me contesto que el encargo debería tener cosas más importantes que hacer. Lamentable.

(Translated by Google)
I wanted to be served at the parts and accessories store. I waited over 30 minutes for someone to come and complain twice about the attendant, and then he finally told me that the customer should have more important things to do. Tragic.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzek9qXzdnRRAB
